# Vault Health Dashboard

This dashboard provides a high-level overview of the structural health and integrity of your vault.

---

## Run Analysis

Click the link below to run the analysis script. The results on this page will update automatically after the script finishes.

**Run Script:** [Execute Vault Health Analysis](file:///D:/THEOPHYSICS_MASTER/00_VAULT_SYSTEM/Scripts/Data/Source/Theophysics_Assets/Scripts/run_vault_health_analysis.bat)

---

## Results

```dataviewjs
// This script reads the JSON file generated by the analyze_vault_health.py script.
const path = "Theophysics_Assets/Dashboards/vault_health_results.json";

const content = await dv.io.load(path);

if (content) {
    const data = JSON.parse(content);

    dv.header(2, "Vault Health Metrics");
    dv.paragraph(`**Overall Health Score:** ${data.health_score}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Total Notes:** ${data.total_notes}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Last Run:** ${data.last_run}`);
    
    dv.header(3, "Areas for Improvement");
    dv.list([
        `Unlinked Notes: ${data.unlinked_notes}`,
        `Untagged Notes: ${data.untagged_notes}`,
        `Broken Links: ${data.broken_links}`
    ]);

} else {
    dv.paragraph("Could not load analysis results. Run the script to generate the data file.");
}
```
